    <h2 align="center">Rosé Pine for Glamour</h2>
</p>

<p align="center">All natural pine, faux fur and a bit of soho vibes for the classy minimalist</p>

<!-- markdownlint-disable MD045 -->
<!-- markdownlint-disable MD013 -->
<p align="center">
    <a href="https://github.com/rose-pine/rose-pine-theme">
        <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/community-rosé%20pine-26233a?labelColor=191724&logo=data:image/svg+xml;base64,&style=for-the-badge" />
    </a>
</p>

Rosé Pine [Glamour](https://github.com/charmbracelet/glamour) styles for terminal applications. Go sources under
[`styles/`](styles/) build to JSON stylesheets; colors follow the official [**Rosé Pine**](https://rosepinetheme.com/)
palette, with one addition from [rose-pine-bat](https://github.com/drluckyspin/rose-pine-bat).

## TL;DR

```bash
make check
make build
make test
make preview
```

## Variants

| Style name            | File                                                                 | Description              |
| --------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------ |
| `rose-pine`           | [`styles/rose-pine.json`](styles/rose-pine.json)                     | Rosé Pine main (dark)    |
| `rose-pine-moon`      | [`styles/rose-pine-moon.json`](styles/rose-pine-moon.json)           | Rosé Pine Moon           |
| `rose-pine-moon-dark` | [`styles/rose-pine-moon-dark.json`](styles/rose-pine-moon-dark.json) | Moon syntax on main base |
| `rose-pine-dawn`      | [`styles/rose-pine-dawn.json`](styles/rose-pine-dawn.json)           | Rosé Pine Dawn (light)   |

## Usage

### JSON stylesheets

Generated `styles/*.json` files are the portable output. Load one from any Glamour-based app — for example with
`WithStylesFromJSONFile`. Some consumers also honor `GLAMOUR_STYLE` pointing at an absolute path to a JSON file.

### Glamour (Go)

```go
import "github.com/charmbracelet/glamour"

r, _ := glamour.NewTermRenderer(
    glamour.WithStylesFromJSONFile("styles/rose-pine.json"),
)
out, _ := r.Render("# Hello\n")
```

## Project layout

Go sources under [`styles/`](styles/) are the source of truth; `make build` regenerates the JSON stylesheets. The Go
layout mirrors [charmbracelet/glamour](https://github.com/charmbracelet/glamour) so variants can be copied upstream with
minimal changes.

```text
rose-pine-glamour/
├── styles/
│   ├── palette.go              # Rosé Pine hex values per variant
│   ├── builder.go              # shared ansi.StyleConfig builder (elements + chroma)
│   ├── helpers.go              # small style helpers
│   ├── rose-pine*.go           # one StyleConfig var per variant
│   ├── styles.go               # style name constants + DefaultStyles map
│   ├── generate.go             # //go:generate → JSON export
│   └── *.json                  # generated stylesheets — do not hand-edit
├── internal/generate-style-json/
│   └── main.go                 # writes styles/*.json from DefaultStyles
├── scripts/
│   ├── verify/                 # Glamour load + render check (make test)
│   ├── log.bash                # Rosé Pine–themed Makefile output
│   └── generate-screenshots.py # gallery PNGs (optional dev tool)
├── examples/
│   └── sample.md               # preview fixture for make preview
├── .github/workflows/
│   └── validate.yml            # CI: make test
├── Common.make                 # shared make targets
├── Makefile
└── go.mod
```

## Developing

Requires `jq` and `go` (`brew install jq go`). Optional: `glow` for `make preview`; `python3` + Pillow for
`make screenshots` (`brew install pillow`).

```bash
make help         # list targets (Rosé Pine–themed output)
make check        # verify tools
make build        # regenerate styles/*.json from Go sources
make test         # validate JSON + Glamour render (scripts/verify)
make screenshots  # regenerate gallery PNGs
make preview      # preview examples/sample.md, switch style with e.g. STYLE=rose-pine-moon-dark
make clean        # remove Python caches and Go test cache
```

Edit palette roles in [`styles/palette.go`](styles/palette.go) and shared element mapping in
[`styles/builder.go`](styles/builder.go), then run `make build`.

## See also

| Repo                                                            | Notes                                      |
| --------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------ |
| [rose-pine-glow](https://github.com/drluckyspin/rose-pine-glow) | Glow installer and `glow.yml` workflow     |
| [rose-pine-bat](https://github.com/drluckyspin/rose-pine-bat)   | bat syntax theme — roles stay aligned here |

## Thanks to

- [charmbracelet/glamour](https://github.com/charmbracelet/glamour)
- [Rosé Pine](https://github.com/rose-pine) for the palette

## Contributing

Issues and pull requests are welcome. For palette changes, stay aligned with the
[official Rosé Pine palette](https://github.com/rose-pine/palette).
